2 ?07 0100011110 5

Constant
2 C 2 1111111111 a mismatch

Unary 0
2 I 0 0010100111 5 mismatch
2 I 0n 1101011000 5 mismatch

Unary 7
2 I 7 0110111001 6 mismatch
2 I 7n 1001000110 4 mismatch

Binary 07
2 AND 07 0010100001 3 mismatch
2 AND 07n 1101011110 7 mismatch
2 OR 07 0110111111 8 mismatch
2 OR 07n 1001000000 2 mismatch
2 XOR 07 0100011110 5 match 1/1
all match XOR 07
2 XOR 07n 1011100001 5 mismatch

2 I 0

0 I 5

2 XOR 07
3 I 1

7 I 5

Applying to 01001000
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 0
Output
0 I 5 = 0
1 I 6 = 0
2 XOR 07 = XOR(I 0,I 7) = XOR(0,0) = 0
3 I 1 = 1
4 I 2 = 0
5 I 3 = 0
6 I 4 = 1
7 I 5 = 0

\boxed{00010010}
